title: elaphrium biflorum
intro: Elaphrium biflorum, also known as the two-flowered elaphrium or Chinese elaphrium, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting digestive health. Elaphrium biflorum can be prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, and its roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
